items.title: US launches strikes on Iran after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The US Central Command says the strikes are intended to impose "heavy costs" on Iran.

items.title: What happened in the opening day of the NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey
items.summary: NATO arrived in Ankara with a message of unity, but President Trump's renewed attacks on European allies have once again laid bare the tensions challenging the alliance's future.
